commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The branch adds load-time session-store recovery from existing .bak/tmp candidates, validates recovered entries, self-heals sessions.json with 0o600 permissions, adds recovery tests, and updates the changelog.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible. Current main catches empty/corrupted/non-object sessions.json reads and returns an empty store, and https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/issues/77783 provides a concrete 0-byte production incident.
commands.review_followup: A narrow automated repair can update the PR head to match the @openclaw/fs-safe temp naming contract and unnest the two fs-safe tests without a product decision.

target.title: fix(sessions): recover session store from bak/tmp after corrupted write
target.author: wangbyg

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
